为了让戴维一族重新生活在阳光之下，多斯跟随吉贝克踏上了出海的道路，为了成就世界之王，兄弟二人隐藏了自己的姓氏开始以洛克斯的名字出现在大众的视野中。
大闹玛丽乔亚、杀死海军大将、抢了五老星的佩刀、夺取天上金、摧毁了正義之门等极其恶劣的行为被世界所关注，无数强者或是被迫或是主动而加入到了团队之中。
直到那一天的到来...
“多斯...杀了我！！”
当多斯的手洞穿了洛克斯的胸膛后他才明白之前所做的一切有多么可笑。
迷茫，无助还有失去至亲的痛楚...
既然这个世界容不下我，那我就毁灭这个世界！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6853979742e2a055a974a38374f7d482","author":"暖男啊","author_id":"","book_id":"7588646954855304216","book_name":"海贼：大海魅魔？被倒追表示很烦","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#180808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7588647086015382040","read_count":"16192","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"472328"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"229","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,开局,海贼,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/bde26a47f7d9e89ecb4bf36ea0519fd2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779315594&x-signature=5os2uN4vi6Gah9PhQZ6zF%2Fy32xE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3096645655105367","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"53"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322061954C6908636FE075087BE05"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"l
